subject: Vietnam textile tariff increase 28% announced
claim_text: Administration announced 28% tariff on Vietnamese textile and fabric imports, effective June 1.

subject: China electronics tariff investigation opened
claim_text: Section 301 investigation opened into Chinese semiconductor and electronics trade practices.

subject: Cambodia apparel tariff increase to 35%
claim_text: New 35% tariff on Cambodian apparel announced, escalating from existing 12%.

subject: India chemical tariff removal discussed
claim_text: Trade negotiators are discussing removal of existing tariffs on Indian chemical imports.

subject: Indonesia footwear tariff rule proposed at 32%
claim_text: Commerce proposed 32% tariff on footwear and shoes imported from Indonesia.

subject: 45% tariff on Indian plastic and rubber imports
claim_text: Executive order signed placing 45% tariff on plastic and rubber chemical imports from India.

subject: Vietnam shoe tariff speculation amid trade talks
claim_text: Analysts speculate Vietnam could face 20-30% tariffs on footwear if trade talks stall.
